title: galium erectum var. genuinum
intro: Galium erectum var. genuinum, also known as bearded bedstraw, is a variety of the Galium erectum plant, a flowering plant species in the bedstraw family (Rubiaceae). This plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Galium erectum var. genuinum include its potential to relieve urinary tract issues, such as kidney stones and urinary infections, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Galium erectum var. genuinum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for use in herbal remedies.
